task.name: Find a coffee shop to work

metadata.persona:
Sarah, a 30-year-old  who values Convenience in her daily life.
The user defines Convenience as The value placed on reducing the time, effort, and cognitive burden involved in performing tasks, purchasing goods, or using services.

model_outputs.thinking_process: To align with Sarah's value of Convenience, I need to quickly find a coffee shop on the Grumble website. The search bar is visible, so I will input 'coffee shop' and click the search button to minimize time and effort.

model_outputs.next_goal: Input 'coffee shop' into the search bar and click the search button to find relevant results.

model_outputs.thinking_process: I have successfully input 'coffee shop' into the search bar and clicked the search button. Now, I need to apply filters to find a convenient coffee shop for Sarah. Convenience for Sarah means reducing time and effort, so I should focus on options that are highly rated and reasonably priced. I will apply a filter for a minimum rating of 4 stars to ensure quality and select a moderate price range ($$) to balance cost and convenience.
